entry.title: New: BFED-9 Bill 152 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 152 (2025), AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, APPENDIX A, PART I, DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING (COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT BLOCK GRANT PROGRAM, COUNTY-OWNED SENIOR AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING, PROJECT: NĀ HALE KŪPUNA OPERATIONS) (BFED-9)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
